oidcRPMetaDataOptionsEnableRI.documentation: RFC 8707 — declare this RP as a Resource Server target for `resource` parameter binding

oidcRPMetaDataOptionsRIIdentifier.documentation: RFC 8707 — Resource Server identifier (audience). Defaults to clientId when empty.

oidcRPMetaDataOptionsRIScopes.documentation: RFC 8707 — Resource Server scopes, encoded as a JSON object `{"<scope>": "<description>"}`. Key: scope name (RFC 6749 charset). Value: human-readable description. Empty string = no RS scopes.

oidcRPMetaDataOptionsRIScopeRules.documentation: RFC 8707 — RS scope authorization rules, encoded as a JSON object `{"<scope>": "<perl_expression>"}`. Each Perl expression is evaluated against the user session when the matching scope is requested for this RS; truthy grants the scope. `1` / `accept` always grants; `0` / `deny` always denies. Empty string = no rules (every declared RS scope is granted).

oidcRPMetaDataOptionsRIScopeRules.en: RS scope authorization rules (JSON: scope → Perl expr)
oidcRPMetaDataOptionsRIScopeRules.fr: Règles d'autorisation des scopes RS (JSON : scope → expr. Perl)
